full_text:
Tumor tissue was cut and dissociated using Dispase. For 9.7 mL of AdF+++ medium, I used 200 uL Dispase, and 100 uL DNAse. Incubated in the oven for 30 min; RBC lysis buffer 2 mL + 10 mL of AdF+++ medium. After centrifuge, I resuspended cells in 1 mL of AdF+++ medium, and counted the cells.

Dispase dissociated cells:

Cell count/ml 1):

total: 2.13 E6

live: 9.26 E5

viability: 43.5 %

size: 8.1 um

Cell count /ml 2):

total: 1.57 E6

live: 8.01 E5

viability: 51 %

size: 8.1 um

Total cell count: 1.85 E6

Total volume: 1 mL

Overall # of cells in 1 mL was 1.85 E6. I froze the cells in Stemcellbanker in 1 cryovial (08.05.2024).
